title: Registration success with unique username
preconditions: No user with username 'testuser1' exists in the database
steps: 1. Navigate to /auth/register, 2. Enter 'testuser1' in the username field, 3. Enter 'password123' in the password field, 4. Click the Register button
expected_result: User is redirected to /notes and the page shows 'testuser1' as the logged-in user

title: Registration failure for duplicate username
preconditions: A user with username 'testuser1' already exists
steps: 1. Navigate to /auth/register, 2. Enter 'testuser1' in the username field, 3. Enter 'password123' in the password field, 4. Click the Register button
expected_result: Registration fails and the page displays 'Username already taken' error message. User stays on the registration page

title: Registration failure for short password
steps: 1. Navigate to /auth/register, 2. Enter 'newuser' in the username field, 3. Enter '12345' (5 characters) in the password field, 4. Click the Register button
expected_result: Registration fails and the page displays 'Password must be at least 6 characters' error message. User stays on the registration page

title: Login success with valid credentials
steps: 1. Navigate to /auth/login, 2. Enter 'testuser1' in the username field, 3. Enter 'password123' in the password field, 4. Click the Login button
expected_result: User is redirected to /notes and the page shows 'testuser1' as the logged-in user

title: Login failure with invalid credentials
steps: 1. Navigate to /auth/login, 2. Enter 'testuser1' in the username field, 3. Enter 'wrongpassword' in the password field, 4. Click the Login button
expected_result: Login fails and the page displays 'Invalid username or password' error message. User stays on the login page

title: Logout invalidates session and blocks protected pages
steps: 1. Click the Logout button in the navigation bar, 2. Observe redirect to /auth/login, 3. Manually navigate to /notes by typing the URL in the browser address bar
expected_result: User is redirected to /auth/login after logout. Navigating directly to /notes also redirects to /auth/login instead of showing the notes page

title: Unauthenticated access to /notes redirects to login
preconditions: User is not logged in (no active session). Clear cookies if needed
steps: 1. Open a new browser tab or incognito window, 2. Navigate directly to /notes by typing the URL
expected_result: User is redirected to /auth/login. The notes page is not shown

title: Create note succeeds for authenticated user
steps: 1. Click the New Note button, 2. Enter 'My First Note' in the title field, 3. Enter 'This is the content of my note' in the content field, 4. Click the Save Note button
expected_result: The notes list page is displayed and 'My First Note' appears in the list

title: Edit note succeeds for owner
preconditions: User 'testuser1' is logged in and has at least one existing note titled 'My First Note'
steps: 1. Click the Edit button next to 'My First Note', 2. Change the title to 'My Updated Note', 3. Change the content to 'Updated content', 4. Click the Update Note button
expected_result: The notes list page is displayed and shows 'My Updated Note' with the updated content. The old title 'My First Note' is no longer shown

title: Delete note succeeds for owner
preconditions: User 'testuser1' is logged in and has at least one existing note titled 'My Updated Note'
steps: 1. Click the Delete button next to 'My Updated Note', 2. On the confirmation page click the Yes, Delete Note button
expected_result: The notes list page is displayed and 'My Updated Note' no longer appears in the list

title: Ownership enforcement blocks cross-user edit and delete
preconditions: Two users exist: 'testuser1' and 'testuser2'. User 'testuser1' has a note. The note's ID is known
steps: 1. Log in as 'testuser1' and create a note, 2. Click the Edit button next to the note and copy the note ID from the URL (the long string after /notes/ and before /edit), 3. Click the Logout button, 4. Log in as 'testuser2', 5. Navigate to /notes/<note-id>/edit by typing the URL, 6. Observe the result, 7. Navigate to /notes/<note-id>/delete by typing the URL, 8. Observe the result
expected_result: User 'testuser2' sees 'Note not found' for both the edit page and the delete page. The note belonging to 'testuser1' is not accessible

title: Validation rejects whitespace-only note fields
steps: 1. Click the New Note button, 2. Enter only spaces in the title field, 3. Enter only spaces in the content field, 4. Click the Save Note button
expected_result: Note is not created. The app displays a clear validation error indicating that fields cannot be empty or whitespace-only

title: Boundary length accepted for note title and content
steps: 1. Click the New Note button, 2. Enter exactly 40 characters in the title field (e.g. 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz12345678901234'), 3. Enter exactly 2000 characters in the content field (prepare and paste a 2000 character block of text), 4. Click the Save Note button
expected_result: The note is created successfully and appears in the notes list with the full 40 character title

title: Duplicate note on browser refresh after create
steps: 1. Click the New Note button, 2. Enter 'Refresh Test Note' in the title field, 3. Enter 'Testing duplicate on refresh' in the content field, 4. Click the Save Note button, 5. After the notes list appears and shows the new note press F5 or click the browser refresh button, 6. If the browser shows a 'Confirm Form Resubmission' dialog click to confirm, 7. Count how many copies of 'Refresh Test Note' appear in the list
expected_result: Only one copy of 'Refresh Test Note' should appear in the notes list. If two copies appear this confirms the known duplicate-on-refresh defect

title: Invalid note ID behavior for malformed and nonexistent IDs
steps: 1. Navigate to /notes/invalidid123/edit by typing the URL directly, 2. Observe the error message, 3. Navigate to /notes/507f1f77bcf86cd799439011/edit by typing the URL directly, 4. Observe the error message
expected_result: Malformed ID (step 1) displays 'Failed to load edit page'. Valid but nonexistent ID (step 3) displays 'Note not found'. Neither response shows a raw stack trace
